guideline: Open by showing clear understanding of the client need, then explain approach, scope, timeline, pricing, and next step.
For ecommerce proposals, mention product catalog, checkout, order management, payment gateway, and content responsibilities.
For mobile MVPs, clarify platform coverage, backend assumptions, notifications, app store support, and phased delivery.
For design work, include screen count, prototype, revision rounds, source files, and developer handoff.
For analytics work, mention data validation, KPI definitions, dashboard pages, refresh method, and handoff documentation.
